mapper.select: SELECT T.JOB_LVL1, T.JOB_LVL2, T.TABLE_NAME, T.TABLE_KOR_NAME, L.START_TIME, L.END_TIME, L.BEFORE_COUNT, L.AFTER_COUNT, L.DIFF_COUNT, CASE WHEN L.JOB_STATUS IS NULL THEN 'WAIT' ELSE L.JOB_STATUS END AS JOB_STATUS, CASE WHEN L.START_TIME IS NULL THEN '' WHEN L.END_TIME IS NULL THEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC((SYSDATE - L.START_TIME) * 24), 'FM00') || ':' || TO_CHAR(TRUNC(MOD((SYSDATE - L.START_TIME) * 1440, 60)), 'FM00') || ':' || TO_CHAR(TRUNC(MOD((SYSDATE - L.START_TIME) * 86400, 60)), 'FM00') ELSE TO_CHAR(TRUNC((L.END_TIME - L.START_TIME) * 24), 'FM00') || ':' || TO_CHAR(TRUNC(MOD((L.END_TIME - L.START_TIME) * 1440, 60)), 'FM00') || ':' || TO_CHAR(TRUNC(MOD((L.END_TIME - L.START_TIME) * 86400, 60)), 'FM00') END AS ELAPSED_TIME FROM TB_MIG_TARGET T LEFT JOIN TB_MIG_LOG L ON T.TABLE_NAME = L.TABLE_NAME ORDER BY T.JOB_LVL1, T.JOB_LVL2, T.TABLE_NAME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_MIG_LOG ( TABLE_NAME, JOB_LVL1, JOB_LVL2, START_TIME, END_TIME, BEFORE_COUNT, AFTER_COUNT, DIFF_COUNT, JOB_STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{tableName}, #{jobLvl1}, #{jobLvl2}, #{startTime}, NULL, #{beforeCount}, 0, 0, 'RUNNING', #{startTime}, #{startTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_MIG_LOG SET END_TIME = #{endTime}, AFTER_COUNT = #{afterCount}, DIFF_COUNT = #{diffCount}, JOB_STATUS = 'COMPLETE', UPDATED_AT = #{endTime} WHERE TABLE_NAME = #{tableName}
UPDATE TB_MIG_LOG SET END_TIME = #{endTime}, AFTER_COUNT = #{afterCount}, DIFF_COUNT = #{diffCount}, JOB_STATUS = 'ERROR', UPDATED_AT = #{endTime} WHERE TABLE_NAME = #{tableName}
mapper.select: SELECT JOB_LVL1, JOB_LVL2, TABLE_NAME, TABLE_KOR_NAME FROM TB_MIG_TARGET ORDER BY JOB_LVL1, JOB_LVL2, TABLE_NAME
